scenarios.starting_prompt: setup context generation for my alloydb database.
scenarios.conversation_plan: Ask the agent to setup the auto context generation for my alloydb database. Connection information: datasource name as my-alloydb, project id is cloud-db-nl2sql, region us-central1, cluster whaoyu-test, instance whaoyu-test-primary, database financial. Verify the agent generate a valid tools.yaml and performed the validation -- if the validation failed, ask the agent to print the full error message received and conclude the conversation. Mark the conversation as completed after the agent successfully set up the files and performed the validation. Do not need to perform mcp reload.
